parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf03954-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Collect Raw Text

### Collect Raw Text

Shapes the item: writes `content`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Extract Structured Fields

### Extract Structured Fields

Pulls structured fields (invoiceNumber, vendor, totalAmount, dueDate) out of free text using a strict extraction prompt.

Ports: â‘ â†’ All Required Fields Found? آ· â‘،â†’ Capture Failure Context

âڑ  failures exit via the error rail

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Extract Structured Fields** as `languageModel`

ًں”‘ Anthropic API key

### All Required Fields Found?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.output?.invoiceNumber }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: â‘ â†’ Upsert into PostgreSQL آ· â‘،â†’ Queue for Manual Review

### Upsert into PostgreSQL

Runs a parameterized `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT` upsert â€” parameters are bound via `queryReplacement`, never string-interpolated, so it's immune to SQL injection.

Ports: â‘ â†’ Merge Review Paths آ· â‘،â†’ Capture Failure Context

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· âڑ  failures exit via the error rail آ· ًں”‘ Postgres connection

### Queue for Manual Review

Sends an email via Gmail â€” subject is the first line of the message body, recipient comes from the item's `email` field.

Ports: â‘ â†’ Merge Review Paths آ· â‘،â†’ Capture Failure Context

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· âڑ  failures exit via the error rail آ· ًں”‘ Google OAuth2

### Merge Review Paths

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record â€” searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Tag Pipeline Metadata

### Tag Pipeline Metadata

Shapes the item: writes `pipeline`, `version`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Guard Non-Empty fileName

### Guard Non-Empty fileName

Drops items that fail the condition; only qualifying items continue (no false branch).

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (PostgreSQL)

### Append Audit Row (PostgreSQL)

Runs a parameterized SQL statement against Postgres â€” values are bound via `queryReplacement`, not string-interpolated, so it's immune to SQL injection.

Ports: â‘ â†’ Send Summary to Slack آ· â‘،â†’ Capture Failure Context

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· âڑ  failures exit via the error rail آ· ًں”‘ Postgres connection

### Send Summary to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#docs`) â€” a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· âڑ  failures exit via the error rail آ· ًں”‘ Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#docs`) â€” a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

â†» retries 3أ—/2s آ· ًں”‘ Slack OAuth2

# Summarize meeting notes with PostgreSQL and Gmail without manual work

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route آ· **Level:** Advanced آ· **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Summarize meeting notes with PostgreSQL and Gmail without manual work. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual invoices is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook â†’ Collect Raw Text â†’ Extract Structured Fields â†’ All Required Fields Found? â†’ Upsert into PostgreSQL â†’ Merge Review Paths â†’ Align Field Names â†’ â€¦

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating invoices in legal
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Improves response time
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Google OAuth2; Postgres connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ًںں¦ entry آ· ًںںھ AI آ· ًںں« actions آ· â¬œ utilities آ· ًںں© outputs آ· ًںں¥ error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath â€” read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger â€” hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click â†’ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

The required-fields check runs *before* the write, not after â€” an incomplete extraction goes to manual review instead of landing a half-populated record in the system of record. Upsert (not plain create) means re-processing the same document twice updates the existing record instead of duplicating it.

## Practice exercises

You've got the basics covered â€” push further:

1. Add a new field to the extraction schema and mark it required â€” watch more documents route to manual review.
2. Feed it a document deliberately missing a required field and trace exactly where it ends up.
3. Change the extraction target (e.g. invoice â†’ contract fields) and adjust the upsert key to match.

## ًں›ں Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3أ— with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail â†’ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ًں”گ Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials â€” never in node parameters.

## ًں¤– AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens â€” keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ًں›  Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ًں”‘ lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your invoices process. Every node card explains its role â€” safe to extend at any marked branch.
